---
title: Svelte Tel Input – Phone Number Component for Svelte 5
description: A lightweight Svelte 5 phone input component. Parse, format, and validate international phone numbers - store in E.164.
template: splash
hero:
  tagline: ""
  actions: []
head:
  - tag: style
    content: |
      /* Hide the auto-generated hero title — HeroAnimation provides its own heading */
      .hero h1 { display: none; }
      /* Remove the large empty hero padding to close the gap */
      .hero { padding-block: 0 !important; min-height: 0 !important; }
---

import HeroAnimation from '../../components/HeroAnimation.svelte';
import LandingPage from '../../components/LandingPage.svelte';

<HeroAnimation client:idle />
<LandingPage client:visible />
